name: fb-page-studio
description: FB Page Studio — Multi Meta App · Rotation so-le · License keys · Graph API
author: trumrename

scripts.build:desktop:setup: npm run native:electron && electron-builder --config.npmRebuild=false --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.pack:all: node scripts/sync-customer-pack.mjs && node scripts/sync-dev-pack.mjs && node scripts/make-customer-zip.mjs
scripts.pack:both: node scripts/sync-internal-pack.mjs && node scripts/sync-customer-pack.mjs && node scripts/make-customer-zip.mjs
scripts.build:customer: npm run native:electron && electron-builder --config.npmRebuild=false --win portable --x64 && node scripts/sync-customer-pack.mjs && node scripts/make-customer-zip.mjs
scripts.release:strict: npm test && npm run build:desktop && npm run pack:customer && npm run pack:dev && npm run release:asset && npm run pack:customer:zip && npm run release:verify
scripts.test: npm run native:node && node scripts/test-requirements.mjs && node scripts/test-caption-pool.mjs && node scripts/test-clean-runtime.mjs
